title: Hussey Seatway
description: husseyseatway.com zoominfo.com/c/hussey-seatway-ltd/137888631 UK-based specialist founded in 2002, expert in designing, manufacturing, and installing retractable, fixed, and portable seating systems for global venues. Serving education, sports, and performing arts sectors with 50+ installations yearly, including prestigious projects like the Royal Opera House and Alexandra Palace. End-to-end support covers consultancy, bespoke engineering, professional installation, and lifetime after-sales care.
